name: test-daily-rewards
description:
Daily login reward system with streak tracking, milestone bonuses, and role-based multipliers.

## Configuration

Set the base reward, maximum streak cap, milestone bonuses, grace period, login notification behavior, and whether claim messages show reward multipliers.

![Daily rewards user configuration](./screenshots/dailyrewards_config.png)

Milestone rewards can be customized as day/reward/message entries. The lower user config controls the streak grace period and player-facing notification toggles.

![Daily rewards notification configuration](./screenshots/dailyrewards_config_2.png)

The system config keeps the module enabled and exposes the `daily-login-check` hook plus the `daily`, `streak`, and `topstreak` commands.

![Daily rewards system configuration](./screenshots/dailyrewards_config_3.png)

## Commands

- `daily`: Claims the player's daily reward. Requires `DAILY_CLAIM`; `DAILY_REWARD_MULTIPLIER` count increases the payout.
- `streak`: Shows current streak, best streak, total earned, multiplier, and next claim timing.
- `topstreak [count]`: Shows the daily streak leaderboard.

The dashboard evidence below shows a real Paper bot running `@streak`, `@daily`, `@streak`, and `@topstreak 5`, with successful module events for the commands and login hook.

![Daily rewards chat and events](./screenshots/dailyrewards_chat_events.png)

## Hook

- `daily-login-check`: Runs on `player-connected` and notifies players when a daily reward is available, when `notifyOnLogin` is enabled.

## Permissions

- `DAILY_CLAIM`: Allows a player to claim daily rewards.
- `DAILY_REWARD_MULTIPLIER`: Count-based multiplier for daily reward payouts.

baseReward.description: Base currency reward per day (multiplied by streak day)

maxStreak.description: Maximum streak day used in reward calculation (prevents unbounded scaling)

default.message: 👑 365 day streak! You are a legend! Bonus: 100000 coins!

milestoneRewards.description: Milestone bonuses awarded when streak reaches specific day counts

streakGracePeriod.description: Hours after which a streak expires (must be >24 so players can always reclaim before expiry). Setting this to 25 means players have only 1 hour after the 24h cooldown before their streak expires — effectively always at-risk. The default of 48h gives a comfortable window.

notifyOnLogin.description: Broadcast a server message when a player logs in with an available daily reward

showMultiplierInClaim.description: Show the player's reward multiplier in the claim confirmation message

permissions.description: Allows a player to claim their daily login reward
Count = reward multiplier for this player (e.g. count=2 means 2x daily reward)

daily.helpText: Claim your daily reward. Rewards increase with your streak! Use /streak to view your streak info.

streak.description: View your current daily reward streak
streak.helpText: View your daily reward streak, best streak, total claimed, and when your next claim is available.

topstreak.helpText: View the top players by best streak. Use /topstreak [count] to show more players (max 25).

arguments.name: count
arguments.helpText: Number of players to show (default: 10, max: 25)

daily-login-check.description: Notify players when their daily reward is available on login
